info.title: apaleo Distribution API
info.description: The Distribution API is tailored for apps that are integrating distribution channels with apaleo. You can subscribe for availability, rates and inventory (ARI) data, create new bookings and modify existing bookings.

post.summary: Create a booking for one or more reservations.
post.description:
Create a booking taking a list of reservations as input
You must have this scope: 'distribution:reservations.manage'.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The list of reservations you want to create.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

put.summary: Modify a booking with one or more reservations.
put.description:
Modify a booking and existing reservations or adds new reservations. Reservations without `id` set will be created, and only reservations with `id` will be modified.
You must have this scope: 'distribution:reservations.manage'.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The list of reservations you want to modify or add.

200.description: Modification of the booking was successful.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

put.description:
Cancel a specific reservation which is in status 'Confirmed' and where the arrival time is in the future.
You must have this scope: 'distribution:reservations.manage'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the reservation that should be processed.

204.description: Cancellation of the reservation was successful.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

get.description:
Get a list of all the subscriptions for ARI notifications for your API client.
You must have this scope: 'distribution:subscriptions.manage'.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

post.description:
Create a new subscription for receiving ARI notifications.
You must have this scope: 'distribution:subscriptions.manage'.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

get.description:
Get the specific subscription for ARI notifications for your API client.
You must have this scope: 'distribution:subscriptions.manage'.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

put.description:
Use this call to modify a subscription.
You must have this scope: 'distribution:subscriptions.manage'.

204.description: Modification of the subscription was successful.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

delete.description:
Use this call to delete a subscription. No more ARI notifications will be sent.
You must have this scope: 'distribution:subscriptions.manage'.

204.description: Deletion of the subscription was successful.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

put.description:
Use this call to trigger full ARI sync. Once it's accepted, the sync will be performed.
You must have this scope: 'distribution:subscriptions.manage'.

202.description: Trigger full ARI sync was accepted.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

nationalityCountryCode.description: The booker's nationality, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code

reservations.description: List of ids for newly created reservations

bookerComment.description: Additional information and comment by the booker

services.description: Additional services (extras, add-ons) that should be added to the reservation

guestComment.description: Additional information and comment by the guest

externalId.description:
The id from the OTA, GDS or other system the booking was made from.
This id should contain the confirmation number the guest was provided with to enable the hotel staff to find the reservation based on that information

travelPurpose.description: The purpose of the trip, leisure or business

pricingType.description: The type of prices, before taxes, before taxes with VAT or after taxes

corporateCode.description: Corporate code provided during creation. Used to find offers during amend.

timeSlices.description:
Gross prices including services and taxes for each time slice. They will be applied to the reservation timeslices
in the order specified from arrival to departure

taxRemittanceResponsibility.description:
Specifies who is responsible for remitting taxes to local authorities for a reservation:
- Hotel: The property (hotel) is responsible for remitting all applicable taxes.
- OTA: The OTA (Online Travel Agency) remits at least one of the applicable taxes.
If the value is not provided, the OTA does not provide any information about tax remittance and the default behavior is assumed.

endpointUrl.description:
Webhook url where the ARI notification is sent to. Please ensure the webhook URL uses some
means of authorization by having a token as query parameter in the URL.

ratePlanIds.description: Rate plans that should be included into the ARI push notification

numberOfDays.description: Number of days from today into the future that should be included in the ARI data push notification

enabled.description: Whether subscription is enabled. No automatic notifications are sent if the subscription is not enabled

cvc.description: The security code of the credit card

cardHolder.description: The name of the credit card holder

expiryMonth.description: The expiration month of the credit card

expiryYear.description: The expiration year of the credit card

cardType.description: The type of the credit card

payerEmail.description: The email address of the shopper / customer

isVirtual.description: Indicates if the card is a virtual credit card. If not specified it defaults to 'false'

activationTime.description: Date and time when credit card gets activated, in ISO 8601

globalDistributionSystemId.description: The ID of the global distribution system.

onlineTravelAgencyId.description: The ID of the online travel agency.

onlineBookingToolId.description: The ID of the online booking tool.

channelManagerId.description: The ID of the channel manager.

centralReservationSystemId.description: The ID of the central reservation system.

nationalityCountryCode.description: The guest's nationality, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code

identificationNumber.description: The guest's identification number for the given identificationType.

bookerComment.description: Additional information and comment by the booker

endpointUrl.description:
Webhook url where the ARI notification is sent to. Please ensure the webhook URL uses some
means of authorization by having a token as query parameter in the URL.

ratePlanIds.description: Rate plans that should be included into the ARI push notification

numberOfDays.description:
Number of days from today into the future that should be included in the ARI data push notification.
Please be aware that when you decrease the number of days included in the ARI data for an active
subscription you need to ensure that the days not included anymore either get deleted or closed on the
channel as otherwise they will not be updated anymore

enabled.description: Whether subscription is enabled. No automatic notifications are sent if the subscription is not enabled

accountNumber.description: The account number (e.g. masked credit card number or last 4 digits)

payerEmail.description: The email address of the shopper / customer

payerReference.description: The reference used to uniquely identify the shopper (e.g. user ID or account ID). Used for recurring payments

isVirtual.description: Indicates if the payment account is a virtual credit card. If not specified it defaults to 'false'

inactiveReason.description: A reason why account is inactive

countryCode.description: The country code, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

regionCode.description: Full ISO 3166-2 return code, e.g. US-CA

taxId.description: Tax or Vat ID of the company

services.description: Additional services (extras, add-ons) that should be added to the reservation

guestComment.description: Additional information and comment by the guest

externalId.description:
The id from the OTA, GDS or other system the booking was made from.
This id should contain the confirmation number the guest was provided with to enable the hotel staff to find the reservation based on that information

travelPurpose.description: The purpose of the trip, leisure or business

pricingType.description: The type of prices, before taxes, before taxes with VAT or after taxes

timeSlices.description:
Gross prices including services and taxes for each time slice. They will be applied to the reservation timeslices
in the order specified from arrival to departure

taxRemittanceResponsibility.description:
Specifies who is responsible for remitting taxes to local authorities for a reservation:
- Hotel: The property (hotel) is responsible for remitting all applicable taxes.
- OTA: The OTA (Online Travel Agency) remits at least one of the applicable taxes.
If the value is not provided, the OTA does not provide any information about tax remittance and the default behavior is assumed.

serviceDate.description: The date the service is delivered, in ISO 8601

count.description: The number of services to book for this date. It defaults to the service offer count when not specified.
The number of services to book for each service date. It defaults to the service offer count when not specified.

dates.description: The optional dates you want to book the service for; if not specified the default service pattern will be used (e.g. whole stay).

endpointUrl.description:
Webhook url where the ARI notification is sent to. Please ensure the webhook URL uses some
means of authorization by having a token as query parameter in the URL.

ratePlanIds.description: Rate plans that should be included into the ARI push notification

numberOfDays.description: Number of days from today into the future that should be included in the ARI data push notification

enabled.description: Whether subscription is enabled. No automatic notifications are sent if the subscription is not enabled
